    if index == 0 || index == word.length - 1
      false
    else
      is_letter?(word[index - 1]) && is_letter?(word[index + 1])
    end
  end

  # This is the crucial step: identifying maximal contiguous segments satisfying the word definition.
  def extract_words(s : String) : Array(String)

    n = s.length

        words.push(segment)

      is_valid_word = true

        c = segment[k]
        if c == '-'
          # Check hyphen placement: must be surrounded by letters
          if k == 0 || k == segment.length - 1 || !is_letter?(segment[k - 1]) || !is_letter?(segment[k + 1])
            is_valid_word = false
